programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Shout At The Devil
programme.desc: During World War One, an English poacher, an American adventurer, and his attractive young daughter set out to destroy a German battle-cruiser awaiting repairs in an inlet just off Zanzibar.

programme.title: Tim
programme.desc: A somewhat mentally handicapped 20-year-old man works as a laborer, but everyone abuses his naiveté. A nice 40-year-old American woman hires him one day and they become close. However, the town and his family see her as predatory.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: Seorang aktor superhero yang kariernya telah merosot mencoba menghidupkan kembali kariernya yang memudar dengan menulis, menyutradarai, dan membintangi sebuah produksi Broadway.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It's Sudden Death!

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Darren McCord, seorang petugas pemadam kebakaran di Pittsburgh Civic Arena, mendapati dirinya berpacu dengan waktu untuk menyelamatkan putrinya, Wakil Presiden, dan stadion yang penuh sesak, saat teroris mengambil alih pertandingan Piala Stanley NHL.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Bencana di terowongan New York saat ledakan meruntuhkan kedua ujungnya. Seorang pahlawan mencoba membantu orang-orang di dalamnya menemukan jalan keluar.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 1
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic, Pt 1
programme.desc: Ketika strain baru yang mematikan dari virus yang tidak dikenal menginfeksi Los Angeles, CDC dan pihak lain harus memerangi infeksi tersebut, sambil juga melawan ekstremis, penjahat, oportunis politik, dan penganut teori konspirasi.

programme.title: Pandemic Part 2
programme.desc: When a deadly new strain of an unknown virus infects a plane on it's way to Los Angeles, CDC Dr. Kayla Martin and her team must battle political obstacles, conspiracy theorists, and an escape of the quarantined survivors.

programme.title: Pandemic, Pt 2
programme.desc: Ketika strain baru yang mematikan dari virus tak dikenal menginfeksi Los Angeles, Dr. Kayla Martin dari CDC dan timnya harus melawan walikota yang keras kepala, para oportunis politik, dan waktu yang terus berjalan untuk menghentikan infeksi dan menyelamatkan dunia dari "Pandemi."

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Combat has taken its toll on Rambo, but he's finally begun to find inner peace in a monastery. When Rambo's friend and mentor Col. Trautman asks for his help on a top secret mission to Afghanistan, Rambo declines but must reconsider when Trautman is captured.

programme.title: Rambo 3
programme.desc: Rambo yang penyendiri meninggalkan biara Buddha untuk membebaskan mentornya dari Pasukan Khusus (Green Beret) yang berada di bawah kendali Soviet di Afghanistan.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Birdman (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang aktor superhero yang kariernya telah merosot mencoba menghidupkan kembali kariernya yang memudar dengan menulis, menyutradarai, dan membintangi sebuah produksi Broadway.

programme.title: Wanted
programme.desc: In Wanted, a slacker is recruited by a secret assassin fraternity, uncovering hidden powers and dark truths as he trains under elite killers, including Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Wanted (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang pekerja kantoran frustrasi saat mengetahui bahwa ia adalah putra seorang pembunuh profesional, dan bahwa ia memiliki kemampuan membunuh super seperti ayahnya.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang teknisi perbaikan drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah porak-poranda oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It's Sudden Death!

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Darren McCord, seorang petugas pemadam kebakaran di Pittsburgh Civic Arena, mendapati dirinya berpacu dengan waktu untuk menyelamatkan putrinya, Wakil Presiden, dan stadion yang penuh sesak, saat teroris mengambil alih pertandingan Piala Stanley NHL.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom Wynne and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue (Jet Li), FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: Agen India Khalid menjalankan misi untuk memburu dan mengeliminasi mantan mentornya, agen teratas negara tersebut, Kabir, yang telah membelot. Perang mematikan pun dimulai.

programme.title: The Coca Cola Kid
programme.desc: A smug sales executive treks to Australia to improve regional sales and becomes embroiled in sexual and professional shenanigans.

programme.title: The Coca Cola Kid
programme.desc: Becker, mantan marinir yang kini menjadi pakar pemasaran Coca-Cola, sedang menjalankan misi untuk meningkatkan penjualan di Australia ketika ia menemukan daerah terpencil di pedalaman, di mana semua orang menenggak bir lokal—dan tidak setetes pun cola dari perusahaannya.

programme.title: Kill Cruise
programme.desc: When a washed-out German sailor in a drunken state agrees to take two British women from Gibraltar to the West Indies in his sailboat, they realize that it's not going to be smooth sailing, and it will take all their wits to survive the trip.

programme.title: Kill Cruise
programme.desc: Seorang pelaut Jerman yang gagal, dalam keadaan mabuk, setuju untuk membawa dua wanita Inggris dari Gibraltar ke Hindia Barat dengan perahu layarnya. Di awal perjalanan, mereka menyadari bahwa perjalanan itu tidak akan berjalan mulus.

programme.title: Gold
programme.desc: A South African gold mine foreman is unwittingly manipulated by an unscrupulous gang of financiers who want to flood the mine to raise the price of gold on the world market.

programme.title: Meteor Part 1
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Meteor, Pt 1
programme.desc: Asteroid Kassandra mengancam Bumi. Imogen berjuang membawa data, sementara Jack dijebak dan anaknya diculik. Di tengah kepanikan global, militer mencoba menghentikan kehancuran.

programme.title: Meteor Part 2
programme.desc: An unmatched meteor shower alerts a scientist, his assistant, and a conspiracy theorist to a massive cover-up and an even massive threat: a meteor aiming to destroy Earth. They race to expose the truth and save the planet.

programme.title: Meteor, Pt 2
programme.desc: Dunia dilanda hujan puing mematikan. Imogen mengungkap ancaman belum usai saat komunikasi runtuh. Jack mengejar penjahat, sementara krisis nuklir memaksa semua pihak bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: A hopeful actress in Los Angeles befriends an amnesiac woman, and as they search for her identity, reality and illusion blur in a dreamlike thriller about ambition, identity, and Hollywood's dark side.

programme.title: Mulholland Dr.
programme.desc: Setelah kecelakaan mobil di Mulholland Drive membuat seorang wanita amnesia, dia dan seorang calon bintang Hollywood mencari petunjuk dan jawaban di seluruh Los Angeles dalam usaha berliku yang melampaui mimpi dan kenyataan.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: Seorang aktor superhero yang kariernya telah merosot mencoba menghidupkan kembali kariernya yang memudar dengan menulis, menyutradarai, dan membintangi sebuah produksi Broadway.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Misanthropic worker Orson detests his lazy colleagues. He finds a secret, magical office that boosts his productivity and status, but his coworkers can't see the room and grow to resent his success.

programme.title: Corner Office (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Saat Orson, karyawan terbaru The Authority, mendapati dirinya terjebak dalam absurditas kehidupan korporat, keterasingannya semakin dalam ketika ia menemukan sebuah ruangan yang menurutnya tidak ada.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme battles terrorists at a hockey game to save the Vice President and stop a stadium bombing in this explosive thriller. Can he stall the game long enough? It's Sudden Death!

programme.title: Sudden Death (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Darren McCord, seorang petugas pemadam kebakaran di Pittsburgh Civic Arena, mendapati dirinya berpacu dengan waktu untuk menyelamatkan putrinya, Wakil Presiden, dan stadion yang penuh sesak, saat teroris mengambil alih pertandingan Piala Stanley NHL.

programme.title: The Odyssey: The Making Of An Epic
programme.desc: Director Christopher Nolan invites you into the world of The Odyssey, his mythic action epic of Homer's saga, and the first film shot entirely with IMAX Film Cameras.

programme.title: The Odyssey: Making Of An Epic
programme.desc: Setelah Perang Troya, Odysseus menghadapi perjalanan berbahaya kembali ke Ithaca, bertemu dengan berbagai makhluk seperti Cyclops Polyphemus, Siren, dan Calypso di sepanjang jalan.

programme.title: Knight And Day
programme.desc: When a fugitive couple's glamorous and sometimes deadly adventure erupts into a maze of double-crosses, close escapes, false identities, and head-spinning romantic snafus, they come to realize that all they can count on is each other.

programme.title: Knight And Day (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda terlibat dengan seorang mata-mata yang tercoreng namanya dan sedang berusaha membersihkan namanya.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in The Mummy, a thrilling new take on the legend. When an ancient queen awakens in modern times, she unleashes a terrifying force, sparking a battle across continents.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in The Mummy, a thrilling new take on the legend. When an ancient queen awakens in modern times, she unleashes a terrifying force, sparking a battle across continents.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Di Mesir kuno, cinta terlarang memicu pengkhianatan yang membuat seorang pendeta dikutuk selamanya. Pada 1926, para penjelajah menemukan makam itu dan tanpa sengaja membangkitkannya sehingga mereka harus menghadapi kejahatan kuno yang terbangun.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Bencana di terowongan New York saat ledakan meruntuhkan kedua ujungnya. Seorang pahlawan mencoba membantu orang-orang di dalamnya menemukan jalan keluar.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Two soldiers killed in Vietnam are revived years later as cyborg super-soldiers. But when memories return, they break free—setting up a brutal showdown between former comrades.

programme.title: Universal Soldier
programme.desc: Para prajurit yang terbunuh saat bertugas dihidupkan kembali melalui eksperimen militer rahasia yang menciptakan prajurit super.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: Birdman
programme.desc: In an effort to jumpstart his career after his superhero movie franchise dies, a psychotic actor writes, directs, and stars in a broadway play that becomes an unlikely hit after he tries to shoots himself in the head during the premiere.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1941, setelah membom Tokyo, seorang pilot AS melakukan pendaratan darurat di Tiongkok. Seorang janda setempat menyelamatkannya dan mempertaruhkan segalanya untuk menyembunyikannya dari pasukan Jepang.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1937, seorang ahli bela diri Tiongkok kembali ke Shanghai dan mendapati gurunya telah meninggal dan sekolahnya diganggu oleh Jepang.

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Saat Orson, karyawan terbaru The Authority, mendapati dirinya terjebak dalam absurditas kehidupan korporat, keterasingannya semakin dalam ketika ia menemukan sebuah ruangan yang menurutnya tidak ada.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Di Mesir kuno, cinta terlarang memicu pengkhianatan yang membuat seorang pendeta dikutuk selamanya. Pada 1926, para penjelajah menemukan makam itu dan tanpa sengaja membangkitkannya sehingga mereka harus menghadapi kejahatan kuno yang terbangun.

programme.title: The Triangle, Pt 1
programme.desc: Seorang taipan perkapalan menyewa seorang jurnalis, seorang ahli oseanografi, seorang paranormal, dan seorang ahli meteorologi untuk mencari tahu mengapa beberapa kapalnya hilang di Segitiga Bermuda. Penyintas dari salah satu insiden tersebut menyadari bahwa realitasnya telah berubah.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: When a successful Phoenix realtor disappears in the desert, investigators discover that a killer is targeting real estate agents and must catch him before he strikes again.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: When a twenty-year-old artist is discovered dead in a suitcase across state lines, detectives must uncover the dark truth behind an obsessive lover's deadly actions.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: A car robbery and Santa Claus bandit captivate headlines, and the crime goes unsolved for years until a local man is found buried in the snow.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: A man stumbles on a body in a neighbor's garage and Detroit police hope the victim's tattoo will help identify the victim.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: A late-night gaming party goes dangerously wrong when a young teenager disappears from the coastal town of Everett, WA.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: Three years after a beloved member of a small town goes missing, a torrential storm lets loose a dark family secret.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: When a rebellious teen disappears on her way to a concert, clues point detectives to dark rituals deep in the forest.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery is made at a construction site when a man is found buried beneath a newly installed septic tank.

programme.title: Buried In The Backyard S6
programme.desc: A body is found ravaged by animals in the wily swamps of north Florida.

programme.desc: The road to enlightenment veers dangerously off course when a curious filmmaker becomes entangled in a deadly cult.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious
programme.desc: Seorang polisi menyamar masuk ke dunia balap liar Los Angeles untuk menangkap geng pembajak truk yang dipimpin oleh Dominic Toretto.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: Brian O'Conner menyamar untuk menjatuhkan gembong narkoba di Miami lewat aksi balap jalanan penuh adrenalin demi membersihkan nama baiknya.

programme.title: The Fast And The Furious: Tokyo Drift

programme.title: Fast Five
programme.desc: Dom dan krunya merencanakan pencurian besar senilai $100$ juta di Brasil sambil menghindari kejaran agen federal elit dan pengusaha korup.

programme.title: Fast & Furious 6
programme.desc: Dom dan timnya bekerja sama dengan Hobbs untuk melumpuhkan tentara bayaran di London dengan imbalan pengampunan penuh atas catatan kriminal.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: Tim balap Dom diburu oleh pembunuh bayaran haus dendam, memaksa mereka kembali beraksi demi melindungi keluarga dan mengamankan program rahasia.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: Dom dipaksa mengkhianati krunya oleh teroris siber misterius, memaksa timnya bekerja sama dengan musuh lama untuk menghentikannya.

programme.title: F9: The Fast Saga
programme.desc: Kisah Dom dan timnya yang harus menghadapi musuh paling mematikan dan pengemudi paling andal yang pernah mereka temui, yaitu Jakob, saudara laki-laki Dom yang terasing dan kini bekerja sebagai pembunuh bayaran internasional.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer

programme.title: Except
programme.desc: Ketika empat sahabat karib berkumpul kembali untuk menghadiri pemakaman di sebuah kediaman kuno, sebuah tindakan ceroboh yang melibatkan hiasan kepala penari Manohra yang terkutuk membangkitkan arwah pendendam yang mulai menghantui dan membuntuti mereka tanpa henti. programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Seorang wanita muda bernama Azlinda berjuang melawan pertempuran mistis yang telah menghantuinya sejak kecil. Meskipun Azlinda telah didiagnosis secara medis dengan "gangguan kecemasan", ia yakin bahwa gangguan yang telah menghantuinya sejak kecil itu terkait erat dengan sejarah hitam orang tuanya.

programme.title: Boy In The Pool
programme.desc: Seorang gadis yang menyukai berenang bertemu dengan seorang anak laki-laki dengan kaki berselaput dan jatuh cinta padanya. Seiring waktu, gadis itu mengalami konflik batin antara mendukung anak laki-laki itu sebagai perenang yang menjanjikan dan mencegah dirinya dari kompleks inferioritas.

programme.title: The Woman In The White Car
programme.desc: Setelah penusukan, Do Kyung membawa saudara perempuannya yang tak sadarkan diri ke rumah sakit. Penyelidikan polisi mengungkap identitas palsu dan hubungan mengejutkan.

programme.title: Dr. Cheon & The Lost Talisman
programme.desc: Dr. Cheon merupakan seorang pengusir setan palsu yang tak bisa melihat atau mendengar hantu. Namun suatu hari, seorang wanita mendatangi Dr. Cheon dan memintanya untuk menyelamatkan adik perempuannya yang kerasukan.

programme.title: Peninsula
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang 4 tahun setelah film "Train To Busan." Masyarakat di semenanjung Korea Selatan yang selamat dari kehancuran, berjuang untuk bertahan hidup.

programme.title: Confession (TVN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang pria yang menjadi tersangka kasus pembunuhan mencari bantuan dari seorang pengacara untuk membuktikan bahwa ia tidak bersalah. Saat mereka mulai mengumpulkan bukti-bukti, kebenaran pun perlahan terkuak.

programme.title: The Roundup: Punishment (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Detektif Ma Seok-do bergabung dengan Tim Investigasi Cyber ​​untuk menangkap Baek Chang-ki, mantan tentara bayaran dan kepala organisasi perjudian daring.

programme.title: The Villainess (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Dibesarkan sejak kecil untuk menjadi pembunuh bayaran elit, Sook-hee memulai serangkaian aksi kekerasan dan balas dendam demi akhirnya meraih kebebasan dan melepaskan diri dari masa lalunya.

programme.title: Train To Busan
programme.desc: Saat virus-zombie melanda Korea Selatan, para penumpang termasuk seorang ayah dan putrinya, pasangan saumi istri, dan beberapa siswa berjuang untuk bertahan hidup dalam kereta api dari Seoul ke Busan.

programme.title: Ditto
programme.desc: Ditto mengisahkan seorang mahasiswa teknik di sebuah universitas bernama Kim Yong. Dia mulai masuk kuliah tahun 1995, namun harus cuti hingga tahun 1999 karena menjalani wajib militer. Suatu hari, Yong menemukan sebuah radio antik yang bisa terhubung dengan masa depan. Yong berkomunikasi dengan Kim Mu-Nee, seorang mahasiswi yang hidup dimasa sekarang, berkuliah di jurusan sosiologi. Komunikasi dari dua periode berbeda ini membuat kisah hidup mereka terungkap satu sama lain.

programme.title: Ditto

programme.title: Rolling
programme.desc: Juri yang depresi terjebak di rumah selama penyebaran Covid. Saat ibunya pergi mengunjungi sang nenek, ia harus menjalankan restoran Kimbap sampai ibunya kembali.

programme.title: I, The Executioner (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Detektif pemula Park Sun Woo dan Seo Do-Cheol, seorang veteran dari tim Divisi Penyelidikan Kejahatan Kekerasan, mengejar seorang pembunuh berantai yang mengguncang dunia mereka.

programme.title: Boss (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Menampilkan anggota geng yang terlibat dalam persaingan sengit untuk mencapai impian mereka sendiri dalam kehidupan sehari-hari.

programme.title: On The Line (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seo-joon kehilangan segalanya akibat penipuan suara (voice phishing) dan menyusup ke sebuah organisasi di Tiongkok untuk bertemu dengan Kwak Pro, perancang di balik sistem penipuan tersebut.

programme.title: You Will Die In 6 Hours
programme.desc: Jun Woo memperingatkan Jeong Yun tentang pembunuhan yang akan menimpanya. Dengan rasa skeptis, ia mulai menyelidiki dan menemukan keterkaitan Jun Woo dengan serangkaian pembunuhan. Ia pun berpacu dengan waktu untuk mengetahui apakah Jun Woo melindunginya atau justru menipunya sebelum kematian yang telah diramalkan itu terjadi.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh yang kecewa menerima satu serangan terakhir dengan harapan dapat menggunakan penghasilannya untuk mengembalikan penglihatan seorang penyanyi yang secara tidak sengaja dibutakannya.

programme.title: Canola
programme.desc: Seorang siswi SMA bertemu kembali dengan neneknya secara dramatis setelah hilang selama 12 tahun.

programme.title: Once Again
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tentang cinta dan keluarga yang berlatar belakang Keluarga Song, yang tak pernah memiliki hari yang tenang.

programme.title: The Night Owl
programme.desc: Seorang tunanetra yang merupakan ahli akupunktur secara ajaib mampu melihat secara normal di malam hari, dan ia tidak sengaja menyaksikan kematian putra mahkota.

programme.title: On The Line
programme.desc: Korban penipuan suara menyusup ke pusat layanan organisasi untuk mendapatkan uangnya kembali, tetapi ia justru menemukan penipuan skala besar lainnya saat melakukan aksinya.

programme.title: The Killer (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembunuh bayaran setuju untuk menjaga seorang gadis remaja, tetapi ketika gadis itu terlibat dengan orang-orang yang tidak baik, dia harus menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: The Swindlers (TVN Movies)

programme.title: Bear Man

programme.desc: Dubai – the largest and most important Motor Sow in the Middle East takes place here. The sheikhs have a penchant for fast and exclusive vehicles, so everything that has a reputation in the car world is gathered here. And: Supercars go straight from the stand in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The future of mobility will be diverse! Also for people who want to drive themselves. BMW presents mixed reality: driving virtual routes in a real car. This is already possible today with the BMW Driving Experience. The Mercedes Vision AVTR is still a long way from being ready for series production. The concept car is inspired by the film Avatar and is intended to literally merge with the driver. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: “BMW Motorrad Vision Next 100” is the name of the motorcycle of the future. A helmet is no longer necessary, connectivity delivers all the information on a pair of driver glasses. In addition to the world premiere of the Future Bike in Santa Monica, our Los Angeles special takes us into the present with the new BMW G 310 R and into the past on the L.A. road trip: Designer Ola Stenegard draws inspiration from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: A new chapter in automotive history begins at the end of 2001. From now on, Volkswagen wants to be involved in the luxury class. The birth of the VW Phaeton. He gets his own glass factory. A 55,000 square meter production facility is being built in the middle of Dresden for around 187 million euros, where the Wolfsburg-based company's top model will be handcrafted. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The Zero Emission Rally 2010 – here the best emission-free vehicles demonstrate their performance and roadworthiness. For three days, the participants compete in a 750-kilometer race through Norway and produce hardly any CO2 emissions! (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series or Audi A8, German sedans enjoy a worldwide reputation. They are famous for their perfection and prestige. Limousines Made in Germany are the epitome of status and they set the standards in terms of comfort, pioneering technology and safety systems. DreamCars presents the most famous, beautiful and luxurious German limousines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: For years they were laughed at and despised in the classic car scene. Classic automobiles from Japan. But since a Toyota 2000 GT from 1967 was sold at an auction in the USA for 1.2 million dollars, they have had a different status. Nippon oldies are no longer just considered bizarre, but have become socially acceptable. Classic Ride presents vintage and classic cars made in Japan. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Nobody is faster, nobody is more reliable, nobody is more successful. Whether Le Mans, the Monte Carlo Rally or Formula 1: There is no race or rally that Porsche has not won, 28,000 times in 65 years. World record. Porsche wins a race with the first prototype, unforgettable the successes of the James Dean sypder at the Carrera Panamericana or the Targa Florio. In 1970 the first Le Mans victory with the 'monster', the Porsche 917. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.sub-title: Viva Mexico! The Panamericana in the 50s
programme.desc: The Mexicana Panamericana is one of the most difficult and longest road races. Mercedes used its almost unbeatable 300 SL in the 50s. The Porsche 550 Spyder is a myth. Not just because James Dean had a fatal accident in this vehicle. Hans Herrmann is considered one of the best German racing drivers ever. The victory in the Porsche 917 at Le Mans or his accident on the Avus in Berlin will never be forgotten. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: BMW's in-house tuner is M-GmbH. Anything that isn't in the garage at three is made really sharp in the hallowed halls of the M tuners. And not only is there more power under the hood, the chassis, brakes and the entire body also have to be on the exercise bike. Pounds down, looks up, performance in, sound out. It's not an easy workout but it's worth the effort. And then the horsepower fireworks are fired. The M4 with 431 hp, the M5 and the M6 ​​Grand Coupé with 560 hp each. The M family is a happy family. And the secret of their success is their pronounced athleticism. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Another new stunt test from action concept's "Stunt Heroes": Stuntman Tobi, called "Heidi", will remotely control an ArtegaGT at full speed. But this is just practice for the big stunt in which he has to drive a car up a steep ramp at 110km/h. The question: how high can remote-controlled cars fly? Action spectacle with flying element! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Top Speed on Tour in Steyr
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed ​​on Tour, Austrian classic car expert Franz Wittner takes presenter Martin Utberg along in a 1929 Steyr Type 12. Together they explore the city of Steyr, which Martin has visited many times, but was never able to stay for more than an hour because his visits always took place during the lunch breaks of the famous Ennstal Classic. This time Franz shows him the most beautiful places in this historic city. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: British cars are considered elegant, exclusive and extremely stylish. The Bentley Continental GT Speed ​​is a coupé with enormous performance: 12 cylinders, 625 hp and 820 Newton meters. The Alps offer the right setting to really enjoy the potential of this special all-wheel drive vehicle. And: The Rapide S is a stylish Gran Coupé. Despite its four doors, it is clearly recognizable as an Aston Martin. V12 engine, 560 hp and 630 Newton meters of torque. These numbers speak for themselves. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: It is the second largest automobile manufacturer in the world, Volkswagen AG. It all begins in 1936 with a car, the VW Beetle. Back then, the Beetle was supposed to make the dream of a Volkswagen come true. There was hardly anything that the Beetle wasn't: a propaganda object, construction helper, million-seller, film star or sports equipment. The Beetle and the Transporter made VW world famous, and the factory in Wolfsburg grew into a multinational company. The Beetle becomes the best-selling car in the world. But VW is building a modern successor almost too late and is heading into crisis. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Günter Baier are taking part in the Franken Classic, one of the most beautiful vintage car rallies in Germany. The participants discover Franconia and its most beautiful sides on picturesque routes. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Classic Rides rummages through the automotive treasure chest and brings to light some almost forgotten, some noble, some bizarre cars from the last few decades. For example the Amphi Cars. Whether on the road or in the water, the extraordinary vehicles are incredibly maneuverable and an absolute eye-catcher. (Station info).

programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg and his team partner Günter Baier are taking part in the Franken Classic, one of the most beautiful vintage car rallies in Germany. The participants discover Franconia and its most beautiful sides on picturesque routes. (Station info).

programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.sub-title: All-wheel drive fun on and off-road
programme.desc: All-wheel drive is only fun off-road? Absolutely not! And these two are proof: The Subaru Forester is taking off in its new sixth generation. We check its qualities on and off-road and find out the secret of its success. And this all-wheel drive stunner is probably one of the most extraordinary electric cars. Five exciting facts and a bonus about the Hyundai Ioniq 5 N. (channel information) await you.

programme.title: New Zealand Jetsprint Championship
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.desc: The international rally event has been part of the “FIA Marathon Rally Worldcup” since 2017. Previously it was the closing event of the “Middle East Rally Championship”. The record winner is Mohammed bin Sulayem. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: The largest tuning trade fair in Europe takes place every year in Friedrichshafen. The Tuning World Bodensee. There are more than 1,000 extraordinary cars to marvel at on Lake Constance. Over 200 international exhibitors from the areas of tuning vehicles and accessories present their world premieres and exclusive conversions on around 85,000 square meters of exhibition space. Lucy is there for us. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: We're getting to the bottom of the current retro trend: Purist café racers and similarly classic motorcycles in the style of the 50s to 80s are on the rise worldwide. Hollywood star Orlando Bloom had a BMW S 1000 R individually tuned in Los Angeles under the motto New Heritage. Motorcycles is showing its classically styled custom bike and other representatives of the heritage scene at the Concorso d'Eleganza Villa d'Este on Lake Como and at the Wheels And Waves festival in Biarritz. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: After accidents, there are often kilometer-long queues of cars. To get through it, the only thing that helps is patience and anticipation of the vacation. And of course they: the ADAC traffic jam advisors. (Station info).

programme.sub-title: Java House Grand Prix of Arlington, Streets of Arlington, Texas

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: “Setra” – this name applies worldwide to buses of the highest quality. One of the largest and most modern bus factories in the world is located here in Neu-Ulm. EvoBus GmbH – a wholly owned subsidiary of Daimler AG – produces transport vehicles on over 700,000 square meters. Well over 3,000 Setra and Mercedes buses leave the production halls every year. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Modern goods logistics! Without them, our everyday digital life would be hard to imagine. We order online every day and at any time. We expect everything to arrive on time - whether it's clothing, a printer spare part or a delivery of screws. But how does it work, smoothly, on time and safely? After all, we live in turbulent times: digitalization, climate crisis, growing global population and politically and economically unstable conditions. How does the logistics industry deal with such challenges? To answer these questions, we have to delve deep into the world of modern goods logistics. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection more than any other vehicle, the international limousines from Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar. They are the crowning achievement of global automotive creation and define the standard of grandiose luxury and elegant comfort. Dream Cars presents the most expensive, luxurious and exclusive limousines in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: When you think of Aston Martin, you automatically think of James Bond and incredibly expensive and sleek sports cars. The British luxury brand also had limousines in its range, such as the Aston Martin Lagonda, which was introduced in 1976. A solvent Aston fan had the V8 sedan extensively converted into a station wagon. Classic Ride presents the Aston Martin Lagonda Shooting Brake and other unique pieces. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: 50 years of the Porsche 911, 60 years of the Chevrolet Corvette: two legends, two myths, two dream cars, and: two philosophies. The Porsche 911 and the Chevrolet Corvette are the sports car icons in Europe and the USA. Both unique, both with a distinctive design, both the epitome of a sports car. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Every day, city dwellers wage a nerve-wracking battle for the last remaining parking space. Not only is the number of vehicles on the roads constantly increasing, but the models are also constantly growing in length and width. The trend towards SUVs puts the crown on this problem. A real war has now broken out between small cars and SUVs. Perfect Ride goes to war for the last gap with the poster child for waste, the BMW X6 and the Smart forfour designed especially for the city. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Stars, mix of styles and a blunder - today's topics at Tuning: Crazy tour bus: The T4 from Samy Deluxe and his gang gets a new life. Modern style mix: There is nothing original about Markus' Polo anymore. XS threesome with XL performance. The 3 Series Compact from Schnitzer mutates into a sports car horror. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes have set up shop on a huge industrial site. This is the ultimate showdown between an extremely fast stuntman and a no less sporty BMW 3 Series... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.sub-title: Classics on the way to auction
programme.desc: In this episode of Top Speed, presenter Martin Utberg visits the vintage car gallery in Toffen, Switzerland. It has been a permanent address for lovers of classic automobiles for over four decades and is known for its regular vintage car auctions. Together with auctioneer Serge Stotzer and his team, Martin takes a look behind the scenes of the preparations for the next auction. Some of the vehicles that will go under the hammer on Saturday, March 21st will be presented in more detail - and Martin will also get behind the wheel himself to experience these classics on the road. An exciting preview (channel information).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: What is the essence of sports cars? Perfomance? Precision? Or the incomparable feeling of mastering the road. For example in the McLaren 600 LT: A corner robber with a dynamic that makes car fanatics' hearts beat faster. In the Aston Martin Vantage Roadster, British tradition and power merge to create an irresistible open-air experience. And: Alfa Romeo Giulia GTAm. (Station info).

programme.title: German Rallycross Championship 2024
programme.desc: Eight races on four different routes: The German Rallycross Championship is looking for its new champion for 2024. The drivers fight for the titles in six different classes on rallycross routes in Germany and the Netherlands. Short sprint races take place on tracks with a mix of asphalt and gravel. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: Royally Yours, This Christmas
programme.desc: A royal prince falls in love with a single mother and hotel housekeeper at Christmastime after he mistakes her for a wealthy hotel guest.

programme.title: Christmas With a Prince: The Royal Baby
programme.desc: Princess Tasha insists on accompanying her husband, Prince Alec, on his royal tour even though she's pregnant. When complications arise, they must figure out how to handle the situation.

programme.title: Christmas by Candlelight
programme.desc: Juliet pitches selling Christmas memory candles to her boss, and asks candle store owner Tom to create new scents. He refuses at first but agrees after realizing the money will help make his daughter's Christmas wish come true.

programme.title: The Heiress of Christmas
programme.desc: Heiress to the famed department store Hamptons, Loryn is put to the test by her grandmother. Things don't run smoothly as Loryn works at the store during its busiest time of the year and tries to impress the handsome but cynical manager Aiden.

programme.desc: A local businessman causes trouble for Jay and Fran when he bails Dylan out; Jay attempts to take control of the situation.

programme.desc: Jay struggles with Mary's new relationship and reluctantly uses Simon's help to close in on the drug and murder investigation; Fran tries to reopen Zoe's case on her own.

programme.title: Mystery Road
programme.desc: With the case apparently solved, Jay is encouraged to leave town but senses that something is not right; Jay questions the motives of those around him; Fran's search for justice experiences another blow.

programme.title: Mystery Road
programme.desc: Mary finds herself in danger and turns to Jay for help, but as the threat closes in, Jay struggles to keep Mary safe; Fran digs deeper into Zoe's disappearance and feels betrayed.

programme.title: Mystery Road

programme.title: Lost Cities of Rome
programme.desc: Rome created the largest empire in the ancient world. Its armies, organisation and building innovation created a vast territory linked by roads. (S)

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: A Deadly Calling: January 1944 to June 1944. Allied troops are pinned down at Anzio, while elsewhere the killing goes on. African-Americans put pressure on the military. (Part 6 of 14)

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Pride of Our Nation: 6 June 1944: D-Day. In the early hours of 6 June 1944, the invasion of France begins. It is the bloodiest day in American history since the Civil War. (Part 7 of 14)

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: A Volunteer Basis: June 1944 to August 1944. The allied death toll increases at an incredible rate, but by August the Germans are in full retreat and Paris is liberated. (Part 8 of 14)

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: FUBAR: Autumn 1944. Allied commanders gamble on a plan to drop troops behind enemy lines. The mission fails, and it becomes clear that the war in Europe will not end before winter. (Part 9 of 14)

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown...
